image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Imagine using a virus to fight a virus.
Context visual: Viral vector vaccines use a harmless virus shell to deliver genetic instructions to our cells.
Escalation visual: Once inside, these instructions help our immune system recognize and combat real threats.
Evidence visual: This method has been crucial in fighting diseases, including COVID-19.
Payoff visual: With ongoing research, viral vector vaccines may hold the key to future immunizations.
Cta visual: Curious about how vaccines work? Like and follow for more science insights!
